page_metadata.biotools__summary: FRET - IBRA is a fully parallelized toolkit to process fluorescence resonance energy transfer (FRET) intensity data to produce ratiometric images with low measurement bias.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FRET - IBRA is a fully parallelized toolkit to process fluorescence resonance energy transfer (FRET) intensity data to produce ratiometric images with low measurement bias.
